items.definition_en: An American is a person from the United States.
items.example_en: My neighbor is an American from New York.

items.definition_en: A Brazilian is a person from Brazil.
items.example_en: The Brazilian won the race.

items.definition_en: A British is a person from the United Kingdom.
items.example_en: The British likes to drink tea.

items.definition_en: A Chinese is a person from China.
items.example_en: He met a Chinese in his class.

items.definition_en: An Egyptian is a person from Egypt.
items.example_en: The Egyptian showed us the pyramids.

items.definition_en: A French is a person from France.
items.example_en: The French visited our city last year.

items.definition_en: A German is a person from Germany.
items.example_en: The German learned English quickly.

items.definition_en: A Greek is a person from Greece.
items.example_en: A Greek helped me find my hotel.

items.definition_en: A Hungarian is a person from Hungary.
items.example_en: My friend is a Hungarian from Budapest.

items.definition_en: An Indian is a person from India.
items.example_en: She spoke with an Indian at the airport.

items.definition_en: An Irish is a person from Ireland.
items.example_en: The Irish told us many stories.

items.definition_en: An Italian is a person from Italy.
items.example_en: The Italian made delicious pizza.

items.definition_en: A Japanese is a person from Japan.
items.example_en: A Japanese joined our team.

items.definition_en: A Mexican is a person from Mexico.
items.example_en: We talked to a Mexican in the park.

items.definition_en: A Polish is a person from Poland.
items.example_en: The Polish loves pierogi.

items.definition_en: A Russian is a person from Russia.
items.example_en: A Russian showed us Moscow.

items.definition_en: A Spanish is a person from Spain.
items.example_en: The Spanish danced very well.

items.definition_en: A Swedish is a person from Sweden.
items.example_en: A Swedish visited our class today.

items.definition_en: A Turkish is a person from Turkey.
items.example_en: The Turkish invited us to dinner.

items.definition_en: A Ukrainian is a person from Ukraine.
items.example_en: We met a Ukrainian at the museum.
